title: Stonehenge
creator: Historic England/English Heritage Trust
description:
English Heritage Stonehenge The great and ancient stone circle of Stonehenge is unique: an exceptional survival from a prehistoric culture now lost to us. The monument was built between 3,000 and 1,000 BC and is aligned with the rising and setting sun at the solstices. However, its exact purpose remains a mystery. (c) Historic England/English Heritage Trust
english-heritage.org.uk

title: Royal Barge  on the Chao Phraya River in Bangkok, Thailand
creator: TST
description:
The royal barge "Sri-suphan-nahongs" on the Chao Phraya River in Bangkok, Thailand. The barge is a large wooden carved barge with a phoenix head covered in gold leaf and is being rowed by at least twenty sailors dressed in red. There is a covered platform in the center of the barge for royalty.

The Royal Barge "Sri-Suphan-Nahongs" in Bangkok.
subject: picture postcards

title: "A Place in Time". St. Maarten - St. Martin, West Indies.
creator: St, Maarten Trading Co.
description:
Reproduction of Nusza Woyda's original painting "A Place in Time", a typical Caribbean scene.

Dist. by St. Marten Trading Co., P.O. Box 927, St. Maarten, Netherlands Antilles

Airmail

"A Place in Time" shows a West Indies woman in traditional dress pushing a baby carriage in front of a Wesst Indies store and a scene of a bay. She is carrying a wicker shopping basket and leading a lamb on a rope.
subject: picture postcards
